source: NvChad - NvChad UI: Using NvChad: opening files, Telescope find, and INSERT-mode cursor movement

questions.q: To open a file directly from the shell you run...
questions.why: nvim followed by the path opens that file.

questions.q: Inside the editor, which command opens a file read-only?
questions.why: :view opens the file without the ability to change it.

questions.q: Which command opens a file in a vertical split?
questions.why: :vsplit is vertical; :split is horizontal; :tabedit is a new tab.

questions.q: Telescope's fuzzy find-file (with ripgrep) is invoked with...
questions.why: :Telescope fd searches interactively as you type.
i enters INSERT mode; the statusline changes to INSERT.

questions.q: In INSERT mode, NvChad's Ctrl+b and Ctrl+e move the cursor to...
options: the beginning and end of the line
the top and bottom of the file
questions.why: Ctrl+b = start of line, Ctrl+e = end of line.

questions.q: In INSERT mode, which pair moves down a line and up a line?
questions.why: Ctrl+j/k move down/up; Ctrl+h/l move left/right one character.
